overall.description: First-person perspective from a Mercedes-Benz truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway during a heavy snowstorm at night. The truck navigates through low visibility conditions, passes other vehicles, and travels through a tunnel section. Game engine footage from a truck simulator with active windshield wipers clearing the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway at night with concrete barriers

events.description: overtaking a white truck on the right lane
approaching and entering the highway tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy snowfall on the highway, maintaining lane position and overtaking slower vehicles

notable_agents.action: white truck being overtaken in the right lane
distant vehicle with headlights approaching in the opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-lane highway covered in snow with visible tire tracks and lane markings obscured
tall concrete sound barrier wall running parallel to the highway
metal guardrail separating the highway from the snowy embankment
large overhead sign structure spanning across the highway
tall light poles with orange glow illuminating the snowy road

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night during a heavy snowstorm. Concrete noise barriers line the left side while metal guardrails run along the right. The truck overtakes a white vehicle on the right as it approaches a tunnel entrance in the distance, with street lights providing sparse illumination through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with artificial ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel, transitioning from dark snowy exterior to artificially lit interior
exiting the tunnel, returning to the dark snowy exterior conditions

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel section, windshield wipers continuing to clear snow

notable_agents.action: truck traveling in the left lane ahead, visible through the windshield

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the highway tunnel enclosing the roadway
concrete tunnel ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a concrete highway tunnel, transitioning from the exposed snowy exterior to a sheltered, artificially lit environment. The concrete walls and ceiling enclose the roadway, with rows of overhead lights providing consistent illumination. The snow continues to fall but is less visible in the tunnel's glow. The truck maintains its course through the tunnel before approaching the exit back into the snowy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway curve with exit ramp

events.description: truck navigates a gentle right curve on the snowy highway
approaching a highway exit ramp on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy highway, navigating gentle curves with reduced visibility while maintaining lane discipline

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling in the left lane, barely visible through the snow

entered.detail: highway exit ramp branching off to the right with directional markings
metal guardrail following the curve of the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the truck returns to the open highway with heavy snow continuing to fall. The road curves gently to the right, with concrete barriers resuming their position on the left side. An exit ramp appears on the right as the truck continues through the wintry conditions, with street lights and distant vehicle headlights piercing through the low visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a heavy midnight snowstorm, transitioning from an exposed highway into a sheltered tunnel and back into the wintry night. It begins on a multi-lane highway lined with concrete noise barriers and metal guardrails, overtaking a white vehicle under the sparse glow of street lights. As the truck maintains its course, the scene shifts from the chaotic snowfall of the exterior into the consistent, artificial illumination of a concrete highway tunnel. The camera then follows the road toward the tunnel's end before emerging back into the open air, where the highway curves gently to the right. Finally, the environment returns to a state of low visibility with heavy snow and distant headlights as the truck passes an exit ramp.
